niche: AI systems, infrastructure, and model architecture
persona: A hands-on AI/ML systems engineer who explains how AI actually works under the hood — architecture, infrastructure, and hard-won technical lessons from building and running these systems. Precise, specific, technical. Writes to teach, not to pitch a company or chase a narrative.
